data.title: Possibly influenced by its listing on Coinbase, DOGINME’s 1H price surged by more than 150%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, DOGINME's 1H increase exceeded 150%, and its market value briefly exceeded 66 million US dollars. 
Earlier news, Coinbase added DOGINME (doginme) to the coin listing roadmap.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Urged to Halt Strategic Cryptocurrency Reserve Plans
data.description: According to Odaily, senior Democrat Gerald Connolly from the Oversight and Government Reform Committee has called on the U.S. Treasury to cease its plans to establish a strategic cryptocurrency reserve. This request follows U.S. President Donald Trump's pursuit of a national Bitcoin reserve and personal cryptocurrency holdings. Connolly also highlighted potential conflicts of interest involving Trump in certain crypto projects, such as his TRUMP meme coin and the World Freedom Finance initiative. In recent months, the terms 'reserve' and 'hoarding' have been used interchangeably, but sources emphasize a critical distinction between the two.

data.title: Bitcoin's Support Levels Analyzed Amid Market Speculations
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights in a Telegram group regarding Bitcoin's potential support levels. He anticipates that the price range of $74,000 to $76,000 could serve as a strong support for Bitcoin. Ng Ah Sio also mentioned that if Michael Saylor does not sell his Bitcoin holdings, the $52,000 level is likely to hold. However, if Saylor is compelled to sell, Ng Ah Sio suggests that $25,000 would be a point to consider re-entering the market. Additionally, he has removed Ethereum from his investable portfolio.

data.title: Solana SIMD-0228 proposal failed with only 43.6% of votes in favor
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solana's Epoch 755 has ended, and the SIMD-0228 proposal has not passed. Although the on-chain vote reached the quorum, the ratio of yes votes to the total number of yes votes and no votes (Yes + No) was 61.4%, which is lower than the support rate of 66.67% (i.e. 2/3).
Dune Analytics data shows that 910 validators have voted on the proposal. 43.6% voted in favor of the proposal, 27.4% voted against it, and 3.3% abstained.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index Declines to Panic Level
data.description: According to PANews, the cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has dropped to 27, indicating a state of panic. This marks a decrease from the previous day's index of 45, as reported by Alternative.me data.

data.title: Trader Eugene: BTC is expected to have support at $74,000 to $76,000, and ETH has been removed from the portfolio
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio said in the Telegram group that for BTC, $74,000 to $76,000 is still expected to be a good support. In addition, assuming Saylor does not sell his BTC, it is believed that $52,000 is likely to hold. If Saylor has to sell his BTC, then $25,000 will be the point to try to enter the market again.
In addition, ETH has been removed from its portfolio.

data.title: EU citizens show little interest in adopting a digital euro
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a survey by the European Central Bank, EU citizens are not interested in adopting the digital euro. 
Earlier, the President of the European Central Bank said that once legislation is in place, the European Central Bank plans to issue a digital euro by October 2025, and members of the European Central Bank’s board of directors are "collaborating" with relevant stakeholders to promote the implementation of the digital euro. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Santiment: Community sentiment towards Ethereum continues to decline, the argument for an unexpected breakthrough is more likely to occur
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto analysis agency Santiment published an article on the X platform stating that the crypto community's sentiment towards Ethereum continues to decline over time. As of press time, Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency by market value, is temporarily priced at $1,865. As more and more FUD (fear, uncertainty and doubt) emotions emerge, the argument that Ethereum may eventually experience an unexpected breakthrough becomes more powerful.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 81,000 USDT with a 3.18% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 14, 2025, 00:02 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 81,000 USDT and is now trading at 80,961.898438 USDT, with a narrowed 3.18% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Meta to Launch Community Notes Feature in the U.S.
data.description: According to PANews, Meta is set to introduce a new feature called 'Community Notes' in the United States on March 18. This feature will be available on Facebook, Instagram, and Threads. Inspired by the crowdsourced fact-checking system implemented by X (formerly Twitter) since 2021, the initiative aims to enhance transparency and scalability in information verification across its platforms.
